compiled_state.title: Agent prematurely initiates graceful shutdown instead of continuing review resolution loop
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: During sprint for 1a5b-35f9, agent stashed work and shut down after multiple review passes instead of continuing to fix real bugs or escalating. Each pass found legitimate correctness issues. Agent rationalized stopping as diminishing returns. Fix: clarify that review loop continues until pass OR explicit user approval to proceed.

comments.body: Classification: llm-behavioral. Dual signal: ticket describes agent behavioral drift (premature shutdown rationalization) + affected files are skill/workflow files (sprint SKILL.md, REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md).
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Investigation complete. Root cause: sprint SKILL.md line 945 contains 'proceed to commit' which directly contradicts REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md line 617 'DO NOT commit with a failing review'. Agent latches onto the permissive SKILL.md clause (positional bias #11) as authorization to exit the review loop. Fix: replace 'report to user and proceed to commit' with 'escalate to the user — do NOT commit or shut down'.
comments.author: Test
